intro: Cheiroglossa louisii, also known as the Lipstick Plant, is a rare and unique epiphytic plant native to the tropical forests of Borneo. The Lipstick Plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with potential health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. The bioactive constituents of Cheiroglossa louisii include iridoids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, the Lipstick Plant is often made into a tea or infusible extract, as well as a tincture, to harness its medicinal benefits.
